title: Report
description: Final synthesized accessibility report for a single page: findings from all agents deduplicated/merged by element_ref, with one plain-language fix per group and a priority order.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when synthesis ran.

summary.description: Optional convenience counts for report_ui; can always be recomputed from issues.

issues.description: Ordered by priority: index 0 is the highest-priority issue to fix first.

agents_flagging.description: Every agent (screen_reader/visual/motor/axe_baseline) that independently flagged this element. 2+ entries means a compounding issue.

severity.description: Final severity for the merged issue. A compounding issue (2+ agents) should generally not rank below the severity of any single contributing finding.

plain_language_description.description: ONE description for the whole group, not one per raw finding.

recommended_fix.description: ONE actionable fix for the whole group.

source_findings.description: finding_id values (from finding.schema.json) that were merged into this issue, for traceability.

priority_rank.description: 1 = fix first. Must be unique and match this issue's position in the issues array (rank i+1 for index i).
